inputs.description: Read docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-27-network-map-readability.md — Task 1. Add primary_role column to network_agents table in scripts/network/build_network_tables.py (compute most common role_norm per agent). Add to network_models.py MapNode. Rebuild tables. Verify API returns primary_role. Commit.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/network/map?connection_types=teacher_student&limit=3' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); n=d['nodes'][0]; print(f'{n["display_name"]}: role={n.get("primary_role","MISSING")}')"
